query:
SELECT c.id, c.claim_number, c.status, c.estimated_cost, c.vehicle_market_value,
       COUNT(q.id) as quote_count
FROM claims c
LEFT JOIN panel_beater_quotes q ON q.claim_id = c.id
GROUP BY c.id, c.claim_number, c.status, c.estimated_cost, c.vehicle_market_value
ORDER BY c.id DESC
LIMIT 10;
